chain.thought: Explanation: The Cessna 404 Titan entered service in 1991. The next aircraft to come into service after 1991 is the Piper PA-31 Navajo, which has been in service since 1993.

judge_thought: Explanation: The Cessna 404 Titan entered service in 1991. The next aircraft entry to begin service after 1991 is the Piper PA-31 Navajo, which entered service in 1993. Other entries started earlier (1976, 1988) or later (2004, 2007, 2009). Therefore, the prediction is correct.
